prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约1689名，2023年约1570名，2024年因宁夏首年新高考改革出现异常暴跌至8403名，2025年物理类大幅回升至约2004名。剔除2024年异常值 后，近3年正常位次区间约1570-2004名，2025年基准约2004名；该校在宁夏物理类招生计划：2022-2024年理科均为22人，2025年物理类22人，2026年计 划20人，较2025年缩招2人（-9.1%），招生名额减少意味着竞争略有加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名202 6年第35名，近年排名稳定在33-35名区间，属于全国顶尖财经类院校，办学层次和综合实力突出；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面或正面舆情事件；抖音综 合热度排名第99位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度未出现异常升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档记录；第五轮学 科评估中，工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，其中2个A+，财经类学科实力位居全国前列，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 上海财经大学位于上海市，对宁夏考生而言属于跨省报考，该校在宁夏招生规模较小（物理类20人 ），属典型的外省优质生源竞争格局，无明显地域偏好影响；金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度2024-2026年处于分化观望状态，整体热度较2021年高点有所降温；宁夏2026年普通高考考生总数约66000人，较2025年（约65897人）基 本持平，竞争格局总体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2004名、2026年缩招2人（-9.1%）带来的竞争加剧效应、学校层次稳定、声誉 平稳、财经类专业热度分化观望等因素，再结合考生总数基本持平等因素微调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约1890名，较2025年小幅前移约11 4名，区间1606-2174名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 1689, in 2023 about 1570, and in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Ningxia, there was an abnormal drop to 8403. In 2025, the physics category rebounded significantly to about 2004. Excluding the 2024 anomaly, the normal ranking range for the past three years is about 1570-2004, with the 2025 baseline at about 2004. The university's enrollment plan for physics category in Ningxia: 22 students for science from 2022-2024, 22 for physics category in 2025, and a planned 20 for 2026, a reduction of 2 students (-9.1%) compared to 2025. The decrease in enrollment means slightly intensified competition and pressure for rankings to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 33-35 in recent years. It is a top national finance and economics institution with outstanding educational level and comprehensive strength. The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative or positive public opinion events. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 99th (rated as average), indicating moderate to low exposure on short video platforms, with no abnormal surge in application attention. There are no records of historical enrollment interruptions for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration received A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, and Statistics A-, totaling four A- or above disciplines, including two A+, placing its finance and economics disciplines among the top in the country, continuously attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Ningxia candidates. The university has a small enrollment scale in Ningxia (20 for physics category), typical of a competitive pattern for high-quality students from other provinces, with no significant regional preference influence. The social popularity of finance/economics/economic majors from 2024-2026 is in a state of differentiation and观望, with overall popularity cooling compared to the 2021 peak. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 65,897), indicating a generally stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2004, the intensified competition effect from the 2026 enrollment reduction of 2 students (-9.1%), stable school level and reputation, differentiated and观望 popularity of finance and economics majors, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the predicted lowest ranking for the 2026 physics category is about 1890, a slight forward movement of about 114 places compared to 2025, with a range of 1606-2174.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1890, range 1606-2174. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as safety. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1606), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors like Finance and Accounting. If ranking is near the upper limit (>2174), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and then adjust through major transfer or minor programs after entering the university.
